parameters.content:
## LRP form → Plane
Fill the PLACEHOLDERS before enabling:
- **URL host** `YOUR_PLANE_BASE`
- **`PLANE_TARGET_PROJECT_ID`** → `ec9b3331-893a-468b-89b2-f8801c97a5af` (LRP)
- **`YOUR_PLANE_API_KEY`** → Plane token (X-API-Key)
- workspace slug = `hijra`

### Assignee dropdown (snapshot of Plane members)
Dropdown shows friendly labels; the Code node's MEMBER_MAP resolves the choice
to a member UUID (hit → assignee; miss → captured in the description). Add BOTH a
dropdown option AND a MEMBER_MAP entry (identical strings) as people sign up:
- `Danny Dwi Cahyono (dcahyono@hijra.id)` → `f799f9fe-ed67-427c-8e51-199de6cd54a6`

### Manual / needs attention
- ATASAN USER is a Jira user-picker (member-snapshot dropdown) — no n8n equivalent; populate/refresh options as people join Plane and map to assignee
- DRAFT PKS (JIKA ADA) and DOKUMEN LEGALITAS MITRA expect Google Doc/Ms.W share links — captured as text URLs in description; Plane create API takes no inline file uploads
